query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.subcategoryId, s.name as subcategoryName 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
WHERE s.name LIKE '%Grill%' OR s.slug LIKE '%grill%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.subcategoryId, s.name as subcategoryName 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
WHERE s.name LIKE '%Grill%' OR s.slug LIKE '%grill%';
